title: Section 7
content: 1[7. Definitions.-- In this Chapter,-- (a) "appropriate Government" means in relation to any disqualification for being chosen as or for being a member of either House of Parliament, the Central Government, and in relation to any disqualification for being chosen as or for being a member of the Legislative Assembly or Legislative Council of a State, the State Government; (b) "disqualified" means disqualified for being chosen as, and for being, a member of either House of Parliament or of the Legislative Assembly or Legislative Council of a State 2[ under the provisions of this Chapter, and on no other ground].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 47 of 1966, s. 20, for CHAPTER III (w.e.f. 14-12-1966). 2. Ins. by Act 29 of 2013, s. 2 (w.e.f. 10-7-2013).
